MIME-Version: 1.0
From: Start Daily <microsoft.start@email2.microsoft.com>
To: emil.skogsund@gmail.com
Date: Wed, 29 May 2024 02:18:32 -0700
Subject: If Trump were convicted in his hush money trial, here's what he could face next
Message-ID: <6656f2ed.630a0220.22495.99a0SMTPIN_ADDED_BROKEN@mx.google.com>
Content-Type: text/html; charset="utf-8"

<!DOCTYPE html><html lang="en-us"><head><meta charset="utf-8"><meta content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1" name="viewport"><title>Start Daily</title></head><body bgcolor="#f0f0f0"><table align="center" bgcolor="#f0f0f0" border="0" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" dir="left" style="font-family:Segoe UI,-apple-system,helvetica Neue,Helvetica,Lucida Grande,Arial,Verdana,sans-serif" width="100%">
        <tr><td><table align="center" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" height="52" style="background-color:#fff;box-shadow:0 3px 0 transparent" width="600"><tr><td align="left" style="padding:0;min-width:150px;min-height:50px;vertical-align:middle"><a href="https://mucp.api.account.microsoft.com/m/v2/c?r=AIAACQH4NKBL3KYUPTU7C3UJN7CRUXXTME3OOE3FTNVJWVXLD4TGQ46NSXOIPCVAYAI4KYYJPR3SXTBW4BQRN7WAQGGLWJOJH5QOJH5K3IRBNPY4HRD7L5BJIVUB63SKJXPE5FVOY6JTGG3T7DQY6BAWGF2UNGZF2ZEUPZ575TAJTKZ3Q63EKKE6&d=AIAADCQCP72H56KKNDNFFYKX6YJUJVHRR57Q22RHQF2ITI3Q7ELWS2ASFREYG7G7RVJ5FNEVZ2FMMT4RYIDMFC2PI6CLLEM2EIZGPYRGMQHFL26QKHEXPFFADITGEKZOFGPWDV7FMJWKTFMA4PSQV7BTNNQXMFJ6OOVM4P3AJTVOB23BVKYEW6DO32YYEP24TLVH6P6OMOTOJOTPN4&" id="NewHeaderMicrosoftStartImg" style="border:none" target="_blank"><img alt="MSN" height="45" src="https://www.bing.com/th?id=OEP.34427CBFF3D4D1C8119FED16222B4DEE&pid=BEmail" style="border:none;text-align:center" width="150"></a></td></tr></table></td></tr>
        <tr><td style="padding:24px 0 24px 0" align="center"><table style="padding:0 3px 0 3px" cellspacing="0" width="600"><tr><td style="padding-right:35px"><a href="https://mucp.api.account.microsoft.com/m/v2/c?r=AIAADFPIUK553OWLL5LU7GQJZPGCCCRCIJ6MCD2HRQ4RVQAP26ZY5P7A6XGZS2NLNO3R53YRVRGOXU2ZKJ3LEGDFQZNRG2CSCCEJCLRVC5J5RNW3Q6S6G6XCTNESZJNE7JGUY6SGORIMKKF5KMX6MMDR2LPBZP7V2FVZKMMKVMUDIY25QP7A5UVP&d=AIAACF24WO3YSSYYKXBOXELXNEIO6ZMQHJOXYWJWST53EN4IOYAMG5QMBIVRU7ITCLUOO7THHK54E2DFOTLOTOO2ZYRHHSRLLIR3RWVOIU2YRQS6PMS46S3SWYZZ7KT3G4WRTBJ37WSZUBOT2NWPSDPERYYTFZCYA5WBTHDLZ7NB5LRDCYZDIAK4&" id="StartHeaderLogo" style="border:none" target="_blank"><img alt="Logo" height="110" src="https://www.bing.com/th?id=OEP.4464C20B10A9835DC26D56A7CF42E3D7&pid=BEmail&w=230&h=110&dpr=1&c=8&rs=2" style="border:none;margin:0" width="230"></a></td><td><table style="border-collapse:collapse"><tr><td height="50"></td></tr><tr><td style="border-left:2px solid;border-left-color:#ffb980;vertical-align:bottom;padding-left:10px"><a href="https://mucp.api.account.microsoft.com/m/v2/c?r=AIAAD2EM2OD55IMGS5A3VJ344DCBQ22I5CMHJHWKDJXKX75ZIIWMZXMZG6PEXF6XFUC6W6IEUXP26BRQ7SPWGGR7CEOIOBWWJFHR3K7T3FSJGJUS7Y45UQBE3MMDERFGHK3XWYMI6B7AKTIUPTYPAZ7DDBU6RHPVHKOX6IAVA2HYO4XWMRJLJZMB&d=AIAACDXVT2OP53474F7BSI7RA5RRYGCUYRNSVL3E4FC53OU57E7OWOMY3TKE3HNUWLPNMRCTJ6QUYAB6GJSOYCOI2WUTEPDKMWUQXUIRXX2OW7XJP56GS77X57G3QVGR5A3KAQEQMK4UIAZDF7IV44XHIKNVG6I5VD2RZO73C7FINSVTX3F4XQZX&" id="StartHeaderDescription" style="border:none;text-align:center;text-decoration:none" target="_blank"><span style="color:#464646;font-size:15px;font-weight:400">Start Daily brings you trending news every weekday</span></a></td></tr></table></td></tr></table></td><td><img alt="" height="1" src="https://www.msn.com/newsletter/t/o?telemetrytoken=9e146be431b341948ed613323644aae9&market=en-us&topicid=d015f8a4-f187-4810-888d-afa2d49537cb" style="border:none" width="1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></td></tr>
